sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46831" key="h)lh/lato" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠλήλατο</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠλήλαντο</orth>, <sense id="n46831.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐλαύνω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἤλημα</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βήλημα</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
